Who I Am

More than just
a student.

I'm Sunraj Thapa Magar, currently studying BSc (Hons) Computer Systems Engineering at ISMT College, based in Kathmandu, Nepal. From a young age, I've been drawn to the way technology shapes everyday life — and I've made it my mission to be part of that change.

I started my academic journey at Graceland Secondary School in Sanga, Kavre, and built on that foundation at Modern School and College in Bhaktapur, completing my +2 in 2024. Now I'm channeling that curiosity into a degree at ISMT College, Kathmandu.

Outside of academics, I'm a fast learner who genuinely enjoys exploring new tools, adapting to challenges, and thinking critically about problems — not just solving them, but understanding why they exist in the first place.

Future Role
🚀

Future Vision

My goal is to become a skilled QA Engineer — someone who bridges development and reliability. I want to build systems that don't just work, but work consistently. Quality isn't an afterthought to me; it's the foundation everything else is built on.

I believe that with continuous learning, persistence, and the right mindset, the gap between where I am and where I want to be is just a matter of time and effort.

Aspiring QA Engineer
